fabricated_divergences.quote: The Spanish-language El País article uniquely foregrounds the UAE-linked investment in World Liberty Financial and international licensing deals in Saudi Arabia and Qatar as a foreign-policy conflict-of-interest angle, a dimension absent from the German and French coverage.
fabricated_divergences.why_unsupported: The El País analysis (article 3) contains no mention of a UAE-linked investment or Saudi/Qatar licensing deals; it centers on the $1.4B crypto figures, WLF, meme coin royalties, and Don Fox's post-Watergate ethics comparison. The UAE 49% stake and Gulf licensing deals appear only in the Uzbek Kun.uz analysis (article 4), which this candidate itself correctly attributes elsewhere. Misattributing this angle to the Spanish source is unsupported.
